data.title: City Museum Announces Opening of Antique Children's Carousel
data.description: On March 13, 2026, the City Museum in St. Louis unveiled its latest addition, the Antique Children's Carousel, a historic hand-carved ride that promises to be a hit with families. This new attraction joins a lineup of beloved features at the museum. The carousel's debut marks an exciting milestone for the museum and is sure to delight visitors of all ages.

data.title: Thomson Reuters Files Documents for Proposed Return of Capital and Share Consolidation Transactions
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Thomson Reuters (listed on TSX and Nasdaq under TRI) submitted its management proxy circular for the upcoming special shareholder meeting. Shareholders will vote on the proposal for a return of capital and share consolidation.

data.title: GREEN RAIN ENERGY HOLDINGS, INC. (OTCID: GREH) Green Rain Energy Announces Review of Legacy Convertible Notes and Strengthened Shareholder Protections
data.description: In Beverly Hills, California, on March 13, 2026, "Green Rain Energy" revealed plans for a thorough examination of specific legacy convertible debt instruments. This decision comes after the Company's disclosure in Form 8-K. The review will focus on debt issued under previous ownership for potential restructuring or resolution.

data.title: GDC Festival of Gaming 2026 Delivers Five Days of Transformative Connection and Insight for an Industry in Transition
data.description: San Francisco recently wrapped up the GDC Festival of Gaming, bringing together various sectors of the global games industry for a vibrant event spanning 5 days. The festival served as a platform for inspiration, networking, and festivities.

data.title: Nobel Announces Change of Transfer Agent
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Nobel Resources Corp. disclosed the selection of Odyssey Trust Company as its new registrar and transfer agent, replacing Computershare Investor Services Inc. Shareholders are informed that all share transfers for the company (TSX–V: NBLC; OTCPK: NBTRF) will now be handled by Odyssey's Toronto office. The transition has been made at the request of Nobel, and shareholders are not required to take any immediate actions regarding this alteration.

data.title: VSMPO-AVISMA: Swiss Appellate Court Rejects Interlink's Appeal and Upholds Decision Invalidating Asset Attachment Against VSMPO-AVISMA
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Zug, Switzerland and New York, a Swiss appellate court confirmed a prior decision that revoked an asset attachment secured by Interlink Metals and Chemicals AG from VSMPO-AVISMA Corporation. The court rejected Interlink's challenge and instructed...

data.title: South Bow Files 2025 Annual Disclosure Documents
data.description: On March 13, 2026, South Bow Corp. (TSX & NYSE: SOBO) of Calgary, Alberta, released its 2025 annual disclosure documents.

data.title: Dr. David Pincus of Pincus Plastic Surgery Launches $1,000 Scholarship to Support Future Leaders in Plastic Surgery
data.description: Dr. David Pincus, a board-certified plastic surgeon and founder of Pincus Plastic Surgery based in BOCA RATON, Fla., revealed on March 13, 2026, his initiation of a $1,000 academic scholarship. This scholarship aims to assist students who are actively seeking education and training in the field of surgical talent, ultimately aiding in the development of the next generation of skilled professionals.

data.title: FCPT Announces Acquisition of a VCA Animal Hospital Property for $3.0 Million
data.description: Based in Mill Valley, California, Four Corners Property Trust, a real estate investment trust specializing in net-leased restaurant and retail properties, recently acquired a VCA Animal Hospital property for $3.0 million. Situated in a busy area in Michigan, the property is operated by the corporation under a long-term triple net lease. The acquisition marks another strategic investment by FCPT in a prime location with solid potential for consistent returns.

data.title: Renowned chef's exit sparks discussions among chefs on evolving restaurant kitchens and practices.
data.description: Renowned chef René Redzepi's impact on the industry has sparked a discussion among fellow chefs about the extent to which restaurant kitchens can evolve and the degree of transformation needed. The debate centers on exploring new approaches and strategies, with a focus on incorporating innovative techniques into kitchen operations. Reevaluating traditional norms and embracing change are key themes as chefs consider adapting to evolving culinary trends and consumer preferences.
